TR39 0006 7010 0000 0074 1687 97

Non-Interventional Research Ethics Committee Application file is made on-line.

A meeting is held on Friday of the last week of each month

to evaluate the applications

.

The results are announced to the researchers by the Ethics Committee secretary until the 3rd week after the Board meets.

After the approval mail is received, the wet signed documents and the final version of your file in the system must be printed out and submitted to the Ethics Committee Secretary Ayşegül Şekli.

You can get consultancy from Ayşegül Şekli, Secretary of the Ethics Committee, on Mondays between 08:30-17:30.
